'''machala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachumbari|kachumbari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachumbari|kachumbari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| machala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæchælæth|mæchælæth]] || [[word:mæchælæj|mæchælæj]] || [[word:mæchælæsh|mæchælæsh]] || [[word:mæchælæ|mæchælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:machachalath|machachalath]] || [[word:machachalaj|machachalaj]] || [[word:machachalash|machachalash]] || [[word:machachala|machachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:machalath|machalath]] || [[word:machalaj|machalaj]] || [[word:machalash|machalash]] || [[word:machala|machala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:machaflafth|machaflafth]] || [[word:machaflafj|machaflafj]] || [[word:machaflafsh|machaflafsh]] || [[word:machaflaf|machaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:machalatha|machalatha]] || [[word:machalaja|machalaja]] || [[word:machalasha|machalasha]] || [[word:machalaka|machalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:machalath|machalath]] || [[word:machalaj|machalaj]] || [[word:machalash|machalash]] || [[word:machala|machala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:machalathal|machalathal]] || [[word:machalajal|machalajal]] || [[word:machalashal|machalashal]] || [[word:machalakal|machalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:machalaathatha|machalaathatha]] || [[word:machalaajaja|machalaajaja]] || [[word:machalaashasha|machalaashasha]] || [[word:machalaaka|machalaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:machalathan|machalathan]] || [[word:machalajan|machalajan]] || [[word:machalashan|machalashan]] || [[word:machalakan|machalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:machalathaoro|machalathaoro]] || [[word:machalajaoro|machalajaoro]] || [[word:machalashaoro|machalashaoro]] || [[word:machalakaoro|machalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
